title: Verify UI update after pausing a trial - Trial Corner
description: Test that the Trial Corner hub updates to reflect the 'Paused' trial status.
preconditions: User has just paused their trial

steps.description: 1. Complete the flow to pause the trial.
2. Navigate to the Trial Corner hub.

expected_result: The Trial Corner hub displays a 'Paused' status, and all content sections (Progress, Engagement, Trending) are locked.
